definitions.text: Belonging to, concerning, or located at a focus (definite location).
Belonging to, concerning, or located at a focus of attention.
examples: The disturbances at the periphery became a focal concern later in the investigation.

definitions.text: One of two lines perpendicular to the axis of a cone such that the cosine of the angle between the line and the axis is equal to the ratio of the cosines o the semiangles of the cone.
An object that is used to focus concentration when performing magic.
The individual who is the focus of a study or review, when the study or review is based on that individual's interactions with others.
